cross_scene_arcs.title: Professional Decline and Rivalry
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bruce's career deteriorates as his story is sidelined, he is shocked by Evan's promotion, and he is physically expelled from his job.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Deflated after his story is held in reserve during a meeting.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Jobless and expelled from the office building with belongings spilled.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Career instability and ongoing rivalry with Evan remain unaddressed.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Divine Powers and Consequences
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bruce receives divine powers from God, uses them for personal gain and heroic acts, but learns that his interventions cause harm, undermining his confidence.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Skeptical and terrified after encountering supernatural events with the janitor.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Mopping alongside God, realizing the negative impact of his well-intentioned actions.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: How to remedy the damage caused by his misguided use of powers.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Relationship with Grace
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bruce's relationship with Grace evolves from using powers to impress her, through rejection and selfless sacrifice, to eventual reconciliation and engagement.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Manipulating the sky to create a romantic moment with Grace.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Engaged to Grace and reporting confidently in his own voice at a public event.

cross_scene_arcs.title: God Challenges Bruce
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: God confronts Bruce as a janitor, reveals his identity and omniscience, offers him divine powers as a test, and later appears in a diner to initiate further interaction.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: God in janitor guise challenges Bruce's complaints and demonstrates control.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: God invites Bruce for a walk after offering powers and vanishing.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Whether Bruce will accept and responsibly handle the divine powers.

cross_scene_arcs.title: God Guides and Critiques Bruce
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: God sets rules for using powers during a walk on the lake, later confronts Bruce about ignoring prayers and his limited help, and finally shows him the negative consequences of his actions before preparing to end guidance.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: God entrusts Bruce with divine powers and establishes boundaries.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: God demonstrates the impact of Bruce's failures and shifts toward ending direct mentorship.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Bruce's ongoing struggle to use powers responsibly and address prayers.

cross_scene_arcs.title: God Departs and Resolves
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: God says goodbye and ascends, leaving Bruce independent; later intervenes to save Bruce's life after a selfless prayer, and is revealed winking as a transformed homeless man, indicating closure.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: God ends his direct involvement, urging Bruce to look within.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: God approves Bruce's growth, revives him, and winks, implying a resolved role.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Grace's Conflict with Bruce's Career Drive
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grace consistently urges caution and confronts Bruce's ambitions, leading to escalating conflicts over his career choices and materialistic values.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Cautious wife managing expectations about Bruce's promotion.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Separated from Bruce after rejecting his materialistic lifestyle.
cross_scene_arcs.unresolved_issue: Fundamental conflict over values and priorities.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Grace's Emotional Turmoil and Relationship Breakdown
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Grace experiences denial, witnesses Bruce's betrayal, terminates the relationship, and finds emotional relief through prayer.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: In denial about a situation at daycare.
cross_scene_arcs.end_state: Emotional pain lifted after praying to forget Bruce.

cross_scene_arcs.title: Romantic Reconciliation and Engagement
cross_scene_arcs.arc_summary: Bruce makes romantic gestures, Grace anticipates a proposal, and they eventually become engaged.
cross_scene_arcs.start_state: Surprised by Bruce's cheerful demeanor and flowers.
